changeSet.author: dts-copilot

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM copilot_ai.nl2sql_query_template WHERE template_code IN ('TPL-21','TPL-22','TPL-23','TPL-24','TPL-25','TPL-26','TPL-27','TPL-28','TPL-29','TPL-30')

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO copilot_ai.nl2sql_query_template (template_code, domain, role_hint, intent_patterns, question_samples, sql_template, parameters, target_view, description, priority) VALUES -- TPL-21: 项目绿植数月度趋势 ('TPL-21', 'project', NULL, '["(项目).*(绿植|花).*(趋势|变化|走势|月度)"]', '["XX项目最近3个月绿植数量趋势"]', 'SELECT snapshot_date, project_name, green_count FROM mart_project_fulfillment_daily WHERE project_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :project_name, ''%'') AND snapshot_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '':months months'' ORDER BY snapshot_date', '{"project_name":{"type":"string","required":true},"months":{"type":"integer","default":3}}', 'mart_project_fulfillment_daily', '项目绿植数月度趋势', 10),
-- TPL-22: 各项目加花次数月度对比 ('TPL-22', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(项目|各项目).*(加花|报花).*(月度|对比|每月|各月)"]', '["各项目最近3个月加花次数对比"]', 'SELECT project_name, event_month, count(*) as 加花次数, sum(plant_number) as 加花总量 FROM fact_field_operation_event WHERE biz_type_name = ''加花'' AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '':months months'' GROUP BY project_name, event_month ORDER BY project_name, event_month', '{"months":{"type":"integer","default":3}}', 'fact_field_operation_event', '各项目加花次数月度对比', 10),
-- TPL-23: 月度应收环比 ('TPL-23', 'settlement', NULL, '["(应收|租金).*(环比|月度对比|对比)"]', '["各项目上月和本月应收对比"]', 'SELECT project_name, settlement_month, monthly_receivable FROM mart_project_fulfillment_daily WHERE settlement_month IS NOT NULL GROUP BY project_name, settlement_month, monthly_receivable ORDER BY project_name, settlement_month DESC', '{}', 'mart_project_fulfillment_daily', '月度应收环比', 10),
-- TPL-24: 项目经营综合排名 ('TPL-24', 'project', NULL, '["(项目).*(经营|综合).*(排名|排行)"]', '["本月项目经营综合排名"]', 'SELECT project_name, AVG(green_count) as 平均绿植数, SUM(change_flower_count) as 换花总次数, SUM(curing_count) as 养护总次数, SUM(add_flower_count) as 加花总次数 FROM mart_project_fulfillment_daily WHERE snapshot_date >= DATE_TRUNC(''month'', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY project_name ORDER BY 平均绿植数 DESC', '{}', 'mart_project_fulfillment_daily', '项目经营综合排名', 10),
-- TPL-25: 养护覆盖率月度趋势 ('TPL-25', 'curing', NULL, '["(养护).*(覆盖率|覆盖).*(趋势|变化|月度)"]', '["各项目养护覆盖率月度变化"]', 'SELECT project_name, snapshot_date, curing_count, curing_positions FROM mart_project_fulfillment_daily WHERE snapshot_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '':months months'' ORDER BY project_name, snapshot_date', '{"months":{"type":"integer","default":3}}', 'mart_project_fulfillment_daily', '养护覆盖率月度趋势', 10),
-- TPL-26: 加花月度趋势 ('TPL-26', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(加花).*(趋势|月度|变化|走势|近.*月)"]', '["最近半年各月加花次数趋势"]', 'SELECT event_month, count(*) as 加花次数, sum(plant_number) as 加花总量 FROM fact_field_operation_event WHERE biz_type_name = ''加花'' AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '':months months'' GROUP BY event_month ORDER BY event_month', '{"months":{"type":"integer","default":6}}', 'fact_field_operation_event', '加花月度趋势', 10),
-- TPL-27: 各类型业务月度分布趋势 ('TPL-27', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(各类|各类型|业务类型).*(月度|趋势|分布|变化)"]', '["最近3个月各类型报花业务趋势"]', 'SELECT event_month, biz_type_name, count(*) as 单数 FROM fact_field_operation_event WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '':months months'' AND biz_status_name NOT IN (''作废'',''驳回'',''草稿'') GROUP BY event_month, biz_type_name ORDER BY event_month, 单数 DESC', '{"months":{"type":"integer","default":3}}', 'fact_field_operation_event', '各类型业务月度分布趋势', 10),
-- TPL-28: 紧急业务占比趋势 ('TPL-28', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(紧急).*(占比|比例|趋势|变化)"]', '["各月紧急报花单占比变化"]', 'SELECT event_month, count(*) as 总单数, SUM(CASE WHEN is_urgent=''是'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as 紧急单数, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_urgent=''是'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(count(*),0), 2) as 紧急占比 FROM fact_field_operation_event WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '':months months'' GROUP BY event_month ORDER BY event_month', '{"months":{"type":"integer","default":6}}', 'fact_field_operation_event', '紧急业务占比趋势', 10),
-- TPL-29: 项目报花成本月度趋势 ('TPL-29', 'flowerbiz', NULL, '["(项目|XX).*(报花|花卉).*(成本|费用).*(趋势|月度|变化)"]', '["XX项目最近半年报花成本趋势"]', 'SELECT event_month, project_name, sum(total_cost) as 月度成本, count(*) as 单数 FROM fact_field_operation_event WHERE (:project_name IS NULL OR project_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :project_name, ''%'')) AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '':months months'' GROUP BY event_month, project_name ORDER BY project_name, event_month', '{"project_name":{"type":"string"},"months":{"type":"integer","default":6}}', 'fact_field_operation_event', '项目报花成本月度趋势', 10),
-- TPL-30: 项目绿植变化日趋势 ('TPL-30', 'project', NULL, '["(绿植).*(日|每天|日趋势|日变化)"]', '["XX项目绿植数量每天变化"]', 'SELECT snapshot_date, green_count, add_flower_count, cut_flower_count, change_flower_count FROM mart_project_fulfillment_daily WHERE project_name LIKE CONCAT(''%'', :project_name, ''%'') AND snapshot_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '':days days'' ORDER BY snapshot_date', '{"project_name":{"type":"string","required":true},"days":{"type":"integer","default":30}}', 'mart_project_fulfillment_daily', '项目绿植变化日趋势', 10);
